HGSS.089.0000:
Kurt: Way to go, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Team Rocket has taken off.\f
My back’s better, too.
Let’s get out of here.\f
HGSS.089.0001:
Proton: What do we have here?\f
I am often labeled as the scariest and
cruelest guy in Team Rocket...\f
I strongly urge you not to interfere
with our business!\f
HGSS.089.0002:
Proton: Humph...
Team Rocket was indeed broken up\r
three years ago. But we continued\r
our activities underground.\f
A small obstacle like you won’t
be much of a problem for our mission.\f
I advise you to be very afraid of what
is to come!\f
HGSS.089.0003:
A SLOWPOKE with its tail cut off...\f
Huh? It has Mail. Read it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.089.0004:
[0103,0000,0000] read the Mail.\f
Be good and look after the house
with Grandpa and SLOWPOKE.\r
           Love, Dad
HGSS.089.0005: A SLOWPOKE with its tail cut off...
